name: pcr-test-demo
description: Lean, production-grade k6 and TypeScript load-testing PoC

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && node -e "require('esbuild').buildSync({ entryPoints: ['src/mock-server.ts', 'src/orchestrator.ts', 'src/load-test.ts'], outdir: 'dist', bundle: true, platform: 'node', format: 'cjs', target: 'node16', external: ['k6'] })"
